Bash(cat << 'PYEOF' > /tmp/screenshot_site.py
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
    
    # Desktop full page
    page = browser.new_page\(viewport={"width": 1440, "height": 900}\)
    page.goto\('http://localhost:3000'\)
    page.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle'\)
    page.screenshot\(path='/tmp/site_hero.png'\)
    page.screenshot\(path='/tmp/site_full.png', full_page=True\)
    
    # Mobile full page
    page2 = browser.new_page\(viewport={"width": 390, "height": 844}\)
    page2.goto\('http://localhost:3000'\)
    page2.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle'\)
    page2.screenshot\(path='/tmp/site_mobile.png', full_page=True\)
    
    browser.close\(\)
    print\("Screenshots saved!"\)
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/screenshot_site.py)

Bash(git add public/book-cover.png public/book-cover-fr.png components/Hero.tsx && git commit -m "fix: resize book covers — 6656x10240 exceeded Vercel's 5M pixel limit

Images were 68M pixels \(13x over limit\), causing Next.js image
optimization to silently fail on Vercel. Resized both EN + FR covers
to 900x1384px \(539KB each, 1.24M pixels\). Updated Hero dimensions.
